subcodes.first_line: O ye two pure souls! Your call reached the ears with eagerness, and meeting with you became beloved and desired [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو نفس زکیه ندای شما بسمع اشتیاق مسموع شد و لقای شما محبوب و مرغوب گشت
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @love and unity, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
